Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DANIEL BROME, ESQ., 510.337.1001, FOR PETITIONERS; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA and NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPRNTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS Granted. No opposition filed.Order signed in open court. JUDGMENT signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
